title: Experts call for placing ecological sustainability at the core of EU policies
content: The Ethics Advice Mechanism published an Opinion recognising ecological sustainability as key to Europe’s resilience, prosperity, security and democracy.
snippet: The Ethics Advice Mechanism published an Opinion recognising ecological sustainability as key to Europe’s resilience, prosperity, security and democracy.

title: Can’t find the talent you need in Europe?
content: A new online platform connecting employers with qualified non-EU candidates is on the way. Find out how it works.
snippet: A new online platform connecting employers with qualified non-EU candidates is on the way. Find out how it works.

title: EU Green Week 2026: Investing in nature to strengthen Europe’s economy and resilience
content: The flagship annual environment conference kicked off in Brussels to explore how investment in nature can strengthen Europe.
snippet: The flagship annual environment conference kicked off in Brussels to explore how investment in nature can strengthen Europe.

title: EU agri-food trade surplus expands in February
content: The latest monthly agri-food trade report shows developments in imports and exports of EU agri-food products in February 2026.
snippet: The latest monthly agri-food trade report shows developments in imports and exports of EU agri-food products in February 2026.

title: Commission approves Carlyle's acquisition of BASF Coatings, subject to conditions
content: The European Commission has approved, under the EU Merger Regulation, the proposed acquisition of BASF's coatings division ('BASF Coatings') by The Carlyle Group Inc. ('Carlyle').
snippet: The European Commission has approved, under the EU Merger Regulation, the proposed acquisition of BASF's coatings division ('BASF Coatings') by The Carlyle Group Inc. ('Carlyle').

title: 20th anniversary of European Sustainable Energy Week welcomes all EU energy commissioners since 2007
content: The theme of this year’s event is 'A Clean, Secure and Competitive Energy Union'.
snippet: The theme of this year’s event is 'A Clean, Secure and Competitive Energy Union'.

title: HR/VP Kallas hosts second Youth Policy Dialogue
content: On 4 June, High Representative/Vice-President (HR/VP) Kaja Kallas will host the second Youth Policy Dialogue in Montenegro.
snippet: On 4 June, High Representative/Vice-President (HR/VP) Kaja Kallas will host the second Youth Policy Dialogue in Montenegro.

title: EU ready for summer wildfires
content: This summer, the EU is deploying a record number of firefighters, aircraft and emergency experts to help protect lives, homes and nature.
snippet: This summer, the EU is deploying a record number of firefighters, aircraft and emergency experts to help protect lives, homes and nature.

title: Commission welcomes political agreement on the Return Regulation
content: The Commission welcomes the political agreement reached between the European Parliament and the Council on 1 June 2026 on the Regulation establishing a new Common European System for Returns, providing Member States with the necessary tools to make returns more efficient.
snippet: The Commission welcomes the political agreement reached between the European Parliament and the Council on 1 June 2026 on the Regulation establishing a new Common European System for Returns,

title: Gas Market Task Force presents its findings on the functioning of EU gas and gas derivatives markets
content: A dedicated group of EU gas experts drawn together to scrutinise the way that EU gas and gas derivatives markets work in practice has presented its analysis in a special report published by the Commission.
snippet: A dedicated group of EU gas experts drawn together to scrutinise the way that EU gas and gas derivatives markets work in practice has presented its analysis in a special report published by the

title: Continuous progress across European Research Area priorities, but structural challenges remain
content: The new ERA Scoreboard evaluates performance across the four ERA priorities, offering robust evidence to support policymaking at both EU and national levels.
snippet: The new ERA Scoreboard evaluates performance across the four ERA priorities, offering robust evidence to support policymaking at both EU and national levels.

title: Innovative techniques: What works best for making energy-intensive industries more sustainable?
content: A new JRC analysis identifies and maps market-ready or nearly ready innovative techniques capable of reducing the environmental impact of energy-intensive industries in the EU.
snippet: A new JRC analysis identifies and maps market-ready or nearly ready innovative techniques capable of reducing the environmental impact of energy-intensive industries in the EU.

title: Commission accelerates transition away from animal testing in chemical safety assessments
content: A new roadmap phasing out the use of animals in chemical safety assessments has been presented.
snippet: A new roadmap phasing out the use of animals in chemical safety assessments has been presented.

title: Eurobarometer highlights obstacles and opportunities for European SMEs recruiting outside the EU
content: A new Eurobarometer survey reveals that 46% of European small and medium-sized enterprises face challenges in finding workers with the right skills. Recruitment from outside the EU remains limited, only 14% of SMEs attempting to hire non-EU nationals.
snippet: A new Eurobarometer survey reveals that 46% of European small and medium-sized enterprises face challenges in finding workers with the right skills. Recruitment from outside the EU remains limited,

title: The EU advance cargo information system (ICS2) helps customs catch smugglers, fraudsters, and criminal activity
content: ICS2 is already providing concrete benefits for customs authorities on the frontline, protecting citizens and the EU economy.  Take a look at examples of ICS2 in action in 2025.
snippet: ICS2 is already providing concrete benefits for customs authorities on the frontline, protecting citizens and the EU economy. Take a look at examples of ICS2 in action in 2025.

title: DG Translation in a city near you: June events
content: Join one of our events in June!
snippet: Join one of our events in June!

title: 190 million EU ETS allowances to be placed into the Market Stability Reserve between September 2026 and August 2027
content: The European Commission has adopted a Communication on the total number of allowances in circulation (TNAC) on the European carbon market.
snippet: The European Commission has adopted a Communication on the total number of allowances in circulation (TNAC) on the European carbon market.

title: 2025 Innovation Fund Net-Zero Technologies Call attracted strong interest from European industry with over 350 applications
content: The Innovation Fund 2025 Net-Zero Technologies (IF25 NZT) Call closed on 23 April 2026, receiving a total of 358 project proposals from 27 countries, confirming strong interest from European industry to innovate and decarbonise.
snippet: The Innovation Fund 2025 Net-Zero Technologies (IF25 NZT) Call closed on 23 April 2026, receiving a total of 358 project proposals from 27 countries, confirming strong interest from European industry

title: Improving energy efficiency of buildings to reduce bills and save energy
content: New rules to improve the energy performance of buildings across the EU come into effect on 30 May 2026.
snippet: New rules to improve the energy performance of buildings across the EU come into effect on 30 May 2026.

title: Commission approves €9 billion Spanish capacity mechanism for security of electricity supply
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €9 billion capacity mechanism for electricity supply for Spain.
snippet: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €9 billion capacity mechanism for electricity supply for Spain.

title: Council adopts first ever EU framework for science diplomacy
content: Today, the Council adopted a recommendation on a European Union framework for science diplomacy, following a proposal by the European Commission.
snippet: Today, the Council adopted a recommendation on a European Union framework for science diplomacy, following a proposal by the European Commission.

title: New Cycling Counts study provides first EU-wide baseline for cycling infrastructure and data collection
content: On the World Bicycle Day, the Commission has published a Cycling Counts study assessing the current state of cycling within the EU.
snippet: On the World Bicycle Day, the Commission has published a Cycling Counts study assessing the current state of cycling within the EU.

title: European Semester 2026: Housing in the spotlight
content: Focus on affordability, supply, and social housing as the Commission for the first time includes housing as a separate annex of the European Semester Spring Package.
snippet: Focus on affordability, supply, and social housing as the Commission for the first time includes housing as a separate annex of the European Semester Spring Package.

title: Strengthening Europe’s tech sovereignty
content: A set of measures to strengthen the EU’s capacity in semiconductors, artificial intelligence (AI), cloud and open source, that will help Europe become a leader in AI.
snippet: A set of measures to strengthen the EU’s capacity in semiconductors, artificial intelligence (AI), cloud and open source, that will help Europe become a leader in AI.

title: 2026 Spring Semester Package sets out guidance on fairer labour markets and improved social protection
content: The 2026 European Semester Spring Package presents new guidelines regarding employment and social policies, with recommendations on human capital (investing in people and their skills), improving job quality and reducing poverty.
snippet: The 2026 European Semester Spring Package presents new guidelines regarding employment and social policies, with recommendations on human capital (investing in people and their skills), improving job

title: Eurobarometer shows continued public support for biodiversity protection across Europe
content: A special Eurobarometer survey revealed that over 90% of Europeans view protecting nature as essential for health and economic prosperity.
snippet: A special Eurobarometer survey revealed that over 90% of Europeans view protecting nature as essential for health and economic prosperity.

title: Commission presents measures to digitalise Europe’s energy system while ensuring sustainable digitalisation
content: The European Commission has taken a significant step to address the impact of digital technologies on the energy sector.
snippet: The European Commission has taken a significant step to address the impact of digital technologies on the energy sector.

title: Executive Vice-President Ribera and Commissioner Jørgensen in Finland to discuss clean energy transition and housing affordability
content: This week, both Executive Vice-President for Clean, Just and Competitive Transition Teresa Ribera and Commissioner for Energy and Housing Dan Jørgensen are visiting Finland to discuss electrification, energy security, affordability and competitiveness.
snippet: This week, both Executive Vice-President for Clean, Just and Competitive Transition Teresa Ribera and Commissioner for Energy and Housing Dan Jørgensen are visiting Finland to discuss electrification,

title: Shaping the workforce of tomorrow
content: The European Skills & VET Week 2026 has officially begun. The year-long campaign will serve as an umbrella for debates, activities and publications organised by stakeholders across Europe, bridging perspectives from different actors involved in the path from education to the labour market.
snippet: The European Skills & VET Week 2026 has officially begun. The year-long campaign will serve as an umbrella for debates, activities and publications organised by stakeholders across Europe, bridging

title: Commission proposes tech sovereignty package to strengthen Europe's digital autonomy and resilience
content: The European Commission today presented the European Technological Sovereignty Package, a set of measures to strengthen Europe's capacity in semiconductors, artificial intelligence (AI), cloud and open source.

title: Spring semester package: steering EU economies to increased competitiveness
content: The European Commission has set out policy guidance for EU countries to help them revitalise the EU's competitiveness. The guidance also steers EU countries along a path to greater strategic autonomy, economic and social resilience and cohesion, while maintaining fiscal sustainability.
snippet: The European Commission has set out policy guidance for EU countries to help them revitalise the EU's competitiveness. The guidance also steers EU countries along a path to greater strategic autonomy,

title: Commission boosts open and interoperable digital ecosystems for public administrations
content: As part of the European Technological Sovereignty Package, the Commission adopted a new Open source Strategy, reaffirming its commitment to work towards an open, collaborative and resilient digital environment.
snippet: As part of the European Technological Sovereignty Package, the Commission adopted a new Open source Strategy, reaffirming its commitment to work towards an open, collaborative and resilient digital

title: Commissioner Roswall's opening address at Green Week 2026
content: Read the Commissioner's full address at the annual environment conference in Brussels.
snippet: Read the Commissioner's full address at the annual environment conference in Brussels.

title: EUAA publishes latest asylum trends in EU+ countries
content: The European Union Agency for Asylum has published its latest analysis of asylum applications. It shows that in March 2026, EU+ countries received around 59,000 applications for international protection, broadly stable compared to February and below the levels recorded throughout most of 2025.
snippet: The European Union Agency for Asylum has published its latest analysis of asylum applications. It shows that in March 2026, EU+ countries received around 59,000 applications for international

title: European Semester Spring Package 2026: a clear call to step up research and innovation efforts across the EU
content: The Spring Package urges Member States to boost research and innovation to unlock Europe’s full potential for competitiveness and resilience.
snippet: The Spring Package urges Member States to boost research and innovation to unlock Europe’s full potential for competitiveness and resilience.

title: OceanEye: placing the EU at the forefront of ocean observation
content: The EU is stepping up its role in ocean observation with OceanEye, a new initiative which aims to position Europe the global leader in ocean intelligence.
snippet: The EU is stepping up its role in ocean observation with OceanEye, a new initiative which aims to position Europe the global leader in ocean intelligence.

title: Commissioner Kos visits Moldova to advance EU accession reforms and investments
content: On Thursday and Friday, Commissioner for Enlargement, Marta Kos, is in Moldova to support with the country on its path to joining the EU. She will notably discuss the progress Moldova has made on reforms and encourage further investments ahead of the second EU-Moldova Summit, which is due to take...

title: Commission approves €54 million Spanish State aid for agricultural companies facing increased fuel prices
content: The European Commission has approved a €54 million Spanish State aid scheme to support agricultural companies facing increased fuel prices due to the Middle East crisis.
snippet: The European Commission has approved a €54 million Spanish State aid scheme to support agricultural companies facing increased fuel prices due to the Middle East crisis.

title: Joint Press Release: Launch of the equity window of the Social Entrepreneurship Fund (SEF) to boost sustainable jobs and social impact in the southern Mediterranean
content: The European Commission, German Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development (BMZ) and KfW Development Bank have today launched the equity fund under the Social Entrepreneurship Fund (SEF), a landmark initiative of the Pact for the Mediterranean.
